summary: Iteration 33 - Welcome Page Redesign testing. All 16 frontend tests passed. Welcome page renders correctly with all required sections, data-testid attributes, Italian text content, and proper navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomePage.jsx is well-structured with clear section separation
All required data-testid attributes are present and correctly named
Italian text content is complete and professional in tone
No duplicate CTAs - only 2 'Inizia il tuo percorso' buttons (Hero + Final CTA)
Mobile responsiveness is excellent - all sections visible and properly formatted
HerionBrand, HerionMarkLight, HerionIcon components used correctly
Navigation buttons (login/register) work correctly and link to proper routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested Welcome Page redesign. All tests passed. Key verified: (1) Welcome page renders at root URL with data-testid='welcome-page'. (2) Hero section with 'Commercialista digitale' badge, value proposition, and CTA linking to /register. (3) Flow section shows 4 steps (Capisci, Prepara, Guida, Segue). (4) Why section shows 4 benefit items with data-testid='why-item-0' through 'why-item-3'. (5) About/Chi Siamo section with company description and principle quote. (6) Consultation section shows 3 user-type cards (Libero professionista, Azienda, Privato). (7) Continuity section shows Prima/Durante/Dopo timeline. (8) Learn section with autonomy message. (9) Final CTA section with register button. (10) Nav login and register buttons work correctly. (11) Footer renders with brand, tagline, and links. (12) All Italian text is present and correct tone. (13) No duplicate CTAs. (14) Mobile responsiveness verified - all sections visible on 390x844 viewport.

details: data-testid='hero-cta-btn' links to /register with text 'Inizia il tuo percorso'
data-testid='flow-section' shows 4 steps: Capisci, Prepara, Guida, Segue
data-testid='why-section' with 4 benefit items (why-item-0 through why-item-3)
data-testid='footer' with brand, tagline, and links
All Italian text verified: Commercialista digitale, Gestisci pratiche fiscali, Perche Herion, Chi siamo, Orientamento, Continuita, Cresci con Herion, etc.
Only 2 'Inizia il tuo percorso' buttons (Hero + Final CTA)
All sections visible on mobile (390x844), proper grid layout, nav buttons accessible
